name: io.github.onetrueclaude-creator/hebbian-vault
description: Usage-adaptive Obsidian vault search: Hebbian + PageRank + BM25 hybrid ranking.

packageArguments.name: --vault
packageArguments.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault directory. Optional — can also be set at runtime via the configure_vault tool.

environmentVariables.name: HEBBIAN_VAULT_LICENSE
environmentVariables.description: Pro license JWT (optional). Unlocks --inline-tracking and other premium features. See the README for details.
